Completed

E-Commerce Analytics Dashboard

Duration: 2023 – 2024

Project Description

A real-time analytics solution designed for e-commerce businesses to monitor product performance, customer behavior, conversions, and sales KPIs in interactive dashboards.

Objective

Enable businesses to make data-driven decisions using accessible and visualized insights.

Outcome

Successfully implemented, helping business analysts and managers track sales insights in real time and optimize growth based on visual metrics.

Technologies Used
React.js Node.js MongoDB D3.js REST APIs
Key Features
Real-time Sales Monitoring Conversion Funnel Analysis Product Click & View Heatmaps Customer Dashboard
Project Repository

For detailed code implementation and documentation, please access the project repository through the link below.
